modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need for safety tips in the workplace

full_description_text: I was looking for some safety tips to follow at work. I think it’s important to know how to stay safe but I couldn’t find any good information. There should be clear guidelines or tips available for everyone to read and understand. It feels like this is something that needs to be addressed.
short_description: Need for safety tips in the workplace
description: I was looking for some safety tips to follow at work. I think it’s important to know how to stay safe but I couldn’t find any good information. There should be clear guidelines or tips available for everyone to read and understand. It feels like this is something that needs to be addressed.
